findings.location: s9 — エラーが発生したリクエストに対するエラー処理
findings.description: Source says "通常、引数のThrowableには java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException が渡される" (i.e., this is the typical/usual case), but the knowledge file omits "通常" and states it as an absolute fact. The qualifier is meaningful: it signals to an AI that the passed type is typically but not always ExecutionException.
findings.source_evidence: 通常、引数のThrowableには\ ``java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException``\ が渡される。
